channel.title: briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesPoliticsOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Anthropic ban may threaten the military's AI advantage over China
item.description: Anthropic's AI tools are now battle-tested, in two radically different military operations — but the Trump administration is still threatening to pull...

item.title: U.S., Ecuadorian forces target "narco-terrorists" in Ecuador military operations
item.description: U.S. and Ecuadorian forces announced drug-trafficking military crackdown operations in Ecuador on Tuesday. The big picture: U.S. Southern Command in a...

item.title: American gas bounty shielding consumers from war spikes, for now
item.description: America's natural gas bounty is acting like a moat, largely shielding the U.S. from price spikes while much of the world reels from escalating unrest ...

item.title: Texas warning signs: 4 takeaways from the first primaries of 2026
item.description: Voters are on the verge of sending multiple House incumbents packing but gave four-term Sen. John Cornyn (R-Texas) hope that he can defeat Texas Attor...

item.title: James Talarico wins Democratic primary in Texas' U.S. Senate race
item.description: Texas state Rep. James Talarico of Austin defeated U.S. Rep. Jasmine Crockett of Dallas for the Democratic nomination for U.S. Senate in Texas, per a ...

item.title: Democrats weigh Trump school vouchers, with billions at stake
item.description: Democratic governors, under pressure, must decide whether to participate in the new federal voucher program, which offers dollars for public and priva...

item.title: Full economic turnaround will take time, Vance says in interview
item.description: Vice President JD Vance argues voters should have patience with the pace of economic improvements, saying there was “no way” to fix the economy overni...

item.title: Senate to vote on forcing Trump to end Iran strikes
item.description: Congress has voted on seven other war powers resolutions since June, all of which failed.

item.title: Cornyn, Paxton reach runoff; other takeaways from big election night
item.description: New congressional maps debuted in Texas and North Carolina, as Republicans defend their majorities and Democrats look to flip both chambers.

item.title: Talarico wins Democratic primary for U.S. Senate in Texas
item.description: Talarico, a state lawmaker, positioned himself as an effective messenger to moderates and disaffected Republicans in his win over Rep. Jasmine Crocket...

item.title: Capitol agenda: GOP bets on immigration fight, not big bills
‘I’ve won affordability’: Trump previews SOTU in Georgia rally
item.description: The president stopped in Marjorie Taylor Greene’s old district to defend his economic record.

item.title: Trump in Iowa tries to shift the conversation back to the economy
item.description: A brief swing through the farm state underscored administration fears about the midterms.

item.title: Americans give Trump low marks on handling of economy as midterms likely to center on affordability
item.description: Sixty-one percent of voters told a CNN poll released Friday that they disapprove of the way Trump is handling the economy.

item.title: Capitol agenda: Trump tests GOP with Fed probe
Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
